Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $60,674,817Details
International Box Office $121,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $181,674,817
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,396,597
Total $20,396,597

Legs:2.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$160,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,555 opening theaters/3,555 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 12th, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
